title: Surgeon Vacancy at BD India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at BD India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BD India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BD India:
BD India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BD India!
